hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk signals and counterparty data to provide VASPs a unified compliance workflow for analyzing destination-of-funds risk with audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Destination of funds risk lacks clear context
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to connect wallet destination risk signals with customer and counterparty profiles across fragmented provider outputs. This disconnect causes slower reviews, gaps in transaction risk analysis, and weaker audit evidence for destination-of-funds monitoring.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet destination risk signals with customer and counterparty profiles, consolidating fragmented provider outputs into unified cases and audit-ready evidence for faster and clearer transaction risk reviews.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals and transaction data to create structured cases, support reviews, preserve evidence, and prepare compliance reports efficiently.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. Structured destination risk
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into decision-ready workflows, cases and audit evidence to support clearer, provider-neutral destination of funds compliance.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing destination-of-funds risk by connecting provider outputs with audit-ready evidence and governance for scalable, controlled compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support destination of funds risk review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet and transaction risk connect to cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves destination risk decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY supports provider orchestration for KYT
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet destination risk?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk and destination analysis into structured cases, alerts and reports to help VASPs manage destination-of-funds risk efficiently and transparently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage destination risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes wallet and transaction risk signals into review workflows, links alerts to counterparties, creates cases for suspicious fund destinations, and maintains evidence for compliance investigation and escalation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and regulatory evidence to support audit readiness and defensible reviews of wallet destination risk activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above KYT providers, connecting their outputs into connected workflows and dashboards without replacing or duplicating existing wallet risk screening tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet risk screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer that aggregates and structures outputs from wallet risk and KYT providers rather than replacing them.
final_title: Connect wallet destination risk to structured cases
final_description: Explore how SFTY links wallet activity, transaction risk and counterparties into controlled compliance workflows and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
